metadata.title: Art of War 2 Online - Knowledge Graph

node_types.Class: A decompiled Java class from the game APK
node_types.System: A functional subsystem of the game engine
node_types.Asset: A game resource file (image, font, map, etc.)
node_types.Unit: A trainable military unit in the game
node_types.Building: A constructible building in the game
node_types.NetworkMessage: A message type in the multiplayer protocol
node_types.Map: A game map or map configuration
node_types.Faction: A playable faction in the game
node_types.ScreenState: A UI screen state in the game flow
node_types.GameConstant: A key game constant or configuration value

edge_types.Uses: A uses B as a dependency or tool
edge_types.Loads: A loads B from storage or network
edge_types.Updates: A modifies the state of B
edge_types.Sends: A transmits B over the network
edge_types.Receives: A receives B from the network
edge_types.Upgrades: A upgrades B to a better version
edge_types.Depends_On: A requires B to function or unlock

classes.name: q
classes.config: RGB_565 default, ARGB_8888 for specific files

classes.name: by
classes.string_decoder: by.a(byte[], boolean) decodes UTF-8 byte arrays

classes.name: ad
classes.types: 1-8 (BACK, CANCEL, EXIT, HELP, ITEM, OK, SCREEN, STOP)

classes.name: s0.k (Main Game Class)
classes.purpose: MAIN GAME CLASS - Game loop, rendering, input

classes.name: s0.w (Game Logic/Map Handler)
classes.purpose: CORE GAME LOGIC - Map rendering, Unit AI, Pathfinding, Combat

systems.name: Game Loop
systems.description: Main game loop running in s0.k (Runnable), handles update/render cycle at ~100ms tick rate

systems.name: Rendering System
systems.description: Canvas-based rendering using Android Graphics adapter, supports 3 screen resolution variants

systems.name: Input System
systems.description: Touch and key event handling with deadzone filtering

systems.name: Combat System
systems.description: Full combat resolution including damage calculation, armour reduction, projectile tracking, splash damage, death animations
key_formulas: splash_damage uses distance factor from lookup table

systems.name: Pathfinding System
systems.description: Unit movement and pathfinding with terrain cost calculation, stuck detection (threshold: 5)

systems.name: Unit AI System
systems.description: Unit autonomous behavior including target acquisition, attack priority, siege mode, guard behavior

systems.name: Resource System
systems.description: Credit generation from buildings, power supply/demand, production capacity management

systems.name: Production System
systems.description: Unit and building production with queue management, build time calculation

systems.name: Research System
systems.description: Technology tree with 48 research IDs affecting unit stats, building stats, and player capabilities

systems.name: Network System
systems.description: TCP-based multiplayer networking with triple-buffered request queue, sender/receiver threads

systems.name: Persistence System
systems.description: J2ME RMS-like file storage using .datrms files for game state persistence

systems.name: Encryption System
systems.description: Multiple encryption/obfuscation layers: XOR asset cipher, custom Base64, XOR stream cipher, data-at-rest encryption

systems.name: UI System
systems.description: Screen state management with 40+ states, dialog system, form-based UI, touch/key input

systems.name: Audio System
systems.description: Audio playback via MediaPlayer wrapper, supports .o, .3, .m formats

systems.name: Fog of War System
systems.description: Vision range calculation and visibility tracking per unit using distance lookup tables

systems.name: Billing System
systems.description: In-app purchase system with Google Play billing, SMS payments, and ad monetization

units.name: Confederation Infantry
units.description: Armed with an automatic rifle. Light equipment allows fast movement. Effective against infantry

units.name: Confederation Grenadier
units.description: Armed with a rocket launcher. Effective against light and medium machinery

units.name: Confederation Flame Assault
units.description: Armed with a hand flamer. Very effective against infantry. Heavy equipment reduces movement speed

units.name: AV-40 Fortress
units.description: Heavy-armoured assault machine. Armed with a heavy machine gun

units.name: T-21 Hammer
units.description: Light tank with high speed rotating gun

units.name: T-22 Zeus
units.description: Heavy tank. Low speed, very powerful damage and wide attack range

units.name: MLRS Torrent
units.description: Multiple rocket launcher system with extra-wide attack range. Needs siege mode

units.name: Rebels Infantry
units.description: Armed with an automatic rifle. Light equipment allows fast movement. Effective against infantry

units.name: Rebels Grenadier
units.description: Armed with a rocket launcher. Effective against light and medium machinery

units.name: Rebels Sniper
units.description: Armed with a long-range sniper rifle. In siege mode overview and attack radius extends

units.name: Coyote
units.description: Light assault car with light armour and medium machine gun. High speed for quick attacks and scouting

units.name: Armadillo
units.description: Heavy-armoured assault machine. Armed with a heavy machine gun

units.name: Rhino
units.description: Medium tank. High speed. Upgrade allows siege mode which increases damage and firing rate

units.name: MMC Porcupine
units.description: Mobile missile system. Armed with heavy machine gun and rocket launcher with fast reloading

units.name: Mine Scorpio
units.description: A personnel mine. Deals light damage to machinery

units.name: Mine Frog
units.description: A multi-charged mine. Jumps before detonation. Fragments and additional charges scatter

units.name: Mine Lizard
units.description: Anti-tank mine. Detonates only when enemy machines are nearby

technologies.name: Bio suit
technologies.effect: Health recovery for infantry increases 3 times

technologies.name: Forced light missiles
technologies.effect: Allows you to train Flame Assaults

technologies.name: Volcano flame gun
technologies.effect: Increases damage for Zeus and Hammer tanks by 25%

technologies.name: Titanium jacket
technologies.effect: Increases armour for all infantry by 1

technologies.name: First-aid kit
technologies.effect: Triples health recovery for all infantry

technologies.name: Rifle 'Hornet-10'
technologies.effect: Sniper's overview radius and fire range increases by 2, damage increases by 20%

technologies.name: Heavy machine gun
technologies.effect: Increases damage for coyotes and armadillos by 15%

technologies.name: Reinforced engine
technologies.effect: Increases speed for all machinery by 1. Allows Rhino tank

network_messages.name: ACK
network_messages.description: Acknowledgment; triggers re-read if cB flag not set

network_messages.name: PLAYER_COUNT
network_messages.description: Player count and team assignment update

network_messages.name: SESSION_INIT
network_messages.description: Full session initialization - the most important init message

network_messages.name: PLAYER_INFO_FULL_A
network_messages.description: Full player info for team A

network_messages.name: PLAYER_INFO_FULL_B
network_messages.description: Full player info for team B

network_messages.name: MATCH_START
network_messages.description: Match starting with map and game configuration

network_messages.name: GAME_STATE
network_messages.description: Full game state synchronization - most frequent message

network_messages.name: ARMY_LIST_FULL
network_messages.description: Complete army list with unit details

maps.name: Map System
maps.description: Map data stored in ca[] byte array with grid cells 30x20 pixels each

campaigns.name: Online Multiplayer Campaign
campaigns.description: Persistent online campaign with towns, alliances, and territory control

encryptions.name: XOR Asset Cipher
encryptions.description: Rotating 8-byte XOR key for asset decryption

encryptions.name: Custom Base64
encryptions.description: Non-standard Base64 alphabet used for game data encoding

encryptions.name: XOR Stream Cipher
encryptions.description: XOR stream cipher for network data with 15-byte key cycle

encryptions.name: Data-At-Rest Encryption
encryptions.description: XOR with appended seed for persistent data
encryptions.method: data[i] ^ (seed >> ((i & 3) << 3)), seed appended as last 4 bytes

encryptions.name: HTTP XOR Cipher
encryptions.description: 15-byte XOR cipher for HTTP fallback communication

encryptions.name: String Obfuscation
encryptions.description: UTF-encoded byte arrays decoded via by.a(byte[], true)

encryptions.name: APK Verification
encryptions.description: CRC32 of ZIP entries via bn/av classes for APK integrity

encryptions.name: Billing Signature Verification
encryptions.description: RSA SHA1withRSA for billing purchase verification

edges.description: Application creates AppCtrl as main controller
AppCtrl creates MIDlet instance (bh)
AppCtrl creates SurfaceView (an/midletview)
AppCtrl dynamically loads game class via Class.forName()
AppCtrl uses Display Manager for screen switching
Main game class uses Game Logic/Map Handler for all game logic
Main game class uses Game State Manager for screen transitions
Main game class uses Config Manager for resource loading
Main game class uses Network Manager for multiplayer
Main game class uses Font Manager for text rendering
Main game class uses Audio Manager for sound
Main game class extends Base Game Canvas
Main game class implements the game loop (Runnable)
Game Logic Handler implements combat resolution
Game Logic Handler implements pathfinding
Game Logic Handler implements unit AI
Game Logic Handler implements fog of war
Game Logic Handler implements resource management
Game Logic Handler implements production system
Game Logic Handler implements research system
Network Manager uses Request Queue
Network Manager creates Sender Thread
Network Manager creates Receiver Thread
Network Manager uses Socket Connection
Network Manager receives GAME_STATE messages
Network Manager receives SESSION_INIT messages
Network Manager receives MATCH_START messages
Sender Thread sends player commands as game state updates
Request Queue uses XOR stream cipher for data encoding
Config Manager loads s0/ assets for small screens
Config Manager loads s1/ assets for medium screens
Config Manager loads s2/ assets for large screens
Config Manager uses asset loader with XOR decryption
Font Manager loads font file /f0
Font Manager loads font file /f1
Font Manager loads font file /f2
Font Manager loads font file /f3
Font Manager uses Bitmap Font Renderer
Asset loader uses XOR cipher for decryption
Asset loader creates Image/Bitmap wrappers
Asset loader uses Font manager for string decoding
Graphics adapter implements abstract Graphics interface
Rendering System uses Graphics adapter for drawing
Rendering System uses Image wrappers for bitmaps
Input System processes events from SurfaceView
Persistence System uses Record Store for data storage
Billing System uses Billing Manager
Billing System uses Android Billing Service
Billing System uses Security/Signature Verifier
Billing System uses Payment Handler
Billing System uses Ad Handler
Audio System uses Audio Manager

Infantry Centre produces Infantry
Infantry Centre produces Grenadiers
Infantry Centre produces Flame Assaults (requires tech)
Machine Factory produces AV-40 Fortress
Machine Factory produces T-21 Hammer
Machine Factory produces T-22 Zeus
Machine Factory produces MLRS Torrent
Technology Centre researches Energy suit
Technology Centre researches Bio suit
Technology Centre researches Enhanced firing rate
Technology Centre researches Armour-piercing bullet
Technology Centre researches Heavy shells
Technology Centre researches Forced light missiles
Technology Centre researches Lava flame fuel
Technology Centre researches Volcano flame gun
Barracks produces Infantry
Barracks produces Grenadiers
Barracks produces Snipers (requires tech)
Factory produces Coyotes
Factory produces Armadillos
Factory produces Rhinos (requires tech)
Factory produces MMC Porcupines
Laboratory researches Titanium jacket
Laboratory researches First-aid kit
Laboratory researches Enhanced fire rate
Laboratory researches Doping
Laboratory researches Snipers
Laboratory researches Rifle Hornet-10
Laboratory researches Heavy machine gun
Laboratory researches Reinforced engine
Generator provides power to Command Centre
Generator provides power to Infantry Centre
Machine Factory requires Technology Centre (tech_requirement: 3)
Forced light missiles unlocks Flame Assault training
Lava flame fuel upgrades AV-40 with heavy flamethrower
Volcano flame gun increases Zeus damage by 25%
Volcano flame gun increases Hammer damage by 25%
Energy suit increases Infantry armour by 2
Bio suit triples Infantry health recovery
Armour-piercing bullet increases Assault damage by 40%
Snipers tech unlocks Sniper training
Reinforced engine unlocks Rhino tank
Hornet-10 increases Sniper range and damage
Heavy machine gun increases Coyote damage by 15%
Heavy machine gun increases Armadillo damage by 15%
Titanium jacket increases Infantry armour by 1
First-aid kit triples Infantry health recovery
Bio suit requires Energy suit research
Lava flame fuel requires Reinforced engine (cross-faction dependency in research IDs)
Confederation Infantry can attack Rebels Infantry
Grenadiers are effective against light machinery like Coyotes
MLRS Torrent with siege mode can attack buildings
Zeus heavy tank can attack Rhino medium tank
Snipers are effective against infantry with long range
Rhino with siege mode can attack buildings
Porcupine missile system can attack heavy tanks
Combat system updates unit HP and state
Combat system updates unit HP and state
Combat system updates building HP
Combat system updates building HP

GAME_RESULT transitions to Game Result screen
ALLY_LIST transitions to Alliance screen
